raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "H.R. 8 requires uniform and universal background checks on all gun purchases and transfers.",
    "The law obligates unlicensed gun sellers to perform background checks on gun purchasers by requiring them to utilize licensed dealers.",
    "Current federal law includes a loophole that allows unlicensed firearm dealers to sell without performing background checks.",
    "Gun offenders overwhelmingly obtain their guns without a background check through private sales.",
    "H.R. 8 would require all firearms purchases to use the National Instant Criminal Background Check System.",
    "When background checks are used, they help keep guns out of the hands of people who should not have them.",
    "The introduction of AJR 4 showcases a formal support for the passage of H.R. 8.",
    "There is a pressing need to close the loophole in federal law regarding background checks for gun purchases and transfers."
  ]
}
```
